roa.docketEntryComment: MOTION FORML BAIL HRG & ORD RELEASING DEFT ON OR OR BAIL REDUCTION FILED
DEFT'S PC1538,5 MOTION TO SUPPRESS EVIDENCE FILED
DA MOTION TO AMEND COMPLAINT FILED

/CAL: IN CUSTODY ACM ELIG REPORT AND BAIL MOTION/X: AS PART OF A NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION, THE PEOPLE MOVE TO DISMISS 19005155 PURSUANT TO PC 1385,/MOPC 1385:DISCHARGED TO PROCEED WITH MTR IN CASE NUMBER 17001855/X:THE DEFENDANT ENTERS A HARVEY WAIVER, /X:ANY RESTITUTION OR CIMINAL PROTECIVE ORDER RESULTING FROM DISMISSED CHARGES MAY BE ADDED AS TERMS AND CONDITIONS OFTHE SENTENCE IN COURT NO,17001855,/SATERM/VD:04-17-20/

/CAL:PRE-TRIAL/INTC/X:DEFENSE MOTION FOR A RELEASE IS DENIED,/X:DEFENSE COUNSEL TO FILE A MOTION FOR RELEASE,/X: IN RESPONSE TO THE UNIQUE AND CONTINUING PUBLIC SAFETY CHALLENGE PRESENTED BY THE CORONAVIRUS (COVID-19),  THE COURT FINDS A GOOD CAUSE FINDING AND AS PERMITTED UNDER GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68115, THE CHIEF JUSTICE OF THE CALIFORNIA SUPREME COURT, AND THE PRESIDING JUDGE TO RESET A NEW LAST DAY,/LDTR:05-01-20/CONTD ACM ELIG RPT, DOP/X:MATTER IS REFERRED TO PRE-TRIAL DIVERSION FOR AN IN-CUSTODY ASSESSMENT,/CONTD:ACM POST-ARRAIGNMENT ELIGIBILITY REPORT ON 03-27-20/CONTD:JURY TRIAL ON 04-17-20/DOP/VD:JURY TRIAL ON 03-24-20/

/CAL:10K BW RETURN FROM 05-02-19 AND SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT/BWDNC/OR/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/GTWM/CTORD:DEFENDANT TO BRING MEDICALDOCUMENTS FOR PROOF OF DEFENDANT'S REASONFOR NOT BEING PRESENT AT LAST COURT APPEARANCE/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/DOP/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING AND MOTION TO SUPPRESS/MISDRED1:1/IRRC/TEXT:DEFTENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/GTWM/CONTD:SET OR DISPO/DOP/OR/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT MAY BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIALMONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THERECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/INTC/SA1:HECTOR VASQUEZ, CARLOS SANTOS, AND JENNIFER A, CIRILO/SA2:5170 MISSION ST,, SF/SATERM/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/INTC/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX: 04-19-19/987,2/BAIL:50,000/X: BAIL IS SET WITHOUT PREJUDICE/SAORD/SA1: HECTOR VASQUEZ, CARLOS HENRY SANTOS, JENNIFER ANTOINETT/SA2: TORTAS BOOS VONI, 5170 MISSION STREET, SF/X: IN CUSTODY ACM REFERRAL REQUESTED,/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING AND ACM ELIGIBILITY ON 04-18-19/DOP/
/CAL:12K BW RETURN FROM 08-14-19 AT PTC/INTC/BWDNC/BAIL:12000/NTW/LDTR:04-01-20/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE AND JURY TRIAL/DOP/
